title: How to Set Up and Use SpaceBot (Better Than OpenClaw?)
summary: SpaceBot is an open-source framework designed for multi-platform community integration including Discord, Telegram, Slack, Twitch, and WebChat. The tutorial demonstrates Docker installation, model routing for token efficiency, Apify skill integration for social media scraping, and multi-agent coordination through a unified UI.
